blocks.text: Match preview: Hubli Tigers face Coastal Kings Mangaluru in 27th Match (T20) on Mon, 6 Jul, 2026, 2:00 pm at M.Chinnaswamy Stadium Bengaluru. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Hubli Tigers vs Coastal Kings Mangaluru

blocks.text: High-scoring belter with good carry; dew makes chasing easier.
Drizzle · High 29°C / Low 21°C · Rain: 1.9 mm · Wind: up to 29 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
